mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM USER_INFO WHERE UI_EMAIL = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM USER_INFO WHERE UI_EMAIL = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO USER_CERTIFICATION_EMAIL_LOG ( UCEL_UI_EMAIL, UCEL_UI_NAME, UCEL_AUTH_CODE, UCEL_REG_DATE ) VALUES( #{id}, #{name}, #{auth_code}, now() );
mapper.update:
UPDATE USER_CERTIFICATION_EMAIL_LOG SET UCEL_AUTH_YN = 'Y', UCEL_AUTH_DATE = now() WHERE UCEL_UI_EMAIL = #{email}
AND UCEL_AUTH_CODE = #{auth_code}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM USER_CERTIFICATION_EMAIL_LOG WHERE UCEL_UI_EMAIL = #{id} AND UCEL_AUTH_YN = 'Y'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO USER_INFO ( UI_BACK_SEAT_PHONE_NUM, UI_NAME, UI_EMAIL, UI_JOIN_DT, UI_PASSWORD ) VALUES( #{phone_num}, #{name}, #{id}, now(), #{pw} );
